name: Integer Overflow to Buffer Overflow
description: The product performs a calculation to determine how much memory to allocate, but an integer overflow can occur that causes less memory to be allocated than expected, leading to a subsequent buffer overflow when writing to the undersized buffer.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[integer_calculation] node computing buffer size feeds into TRANSFORM[allocate] which creates a STORAGE[buffer] node, where the calculation can overflow causing undersized allocation, followed by TRANSFORM[write] exceeding the buffer bounds
